scripts.build: node scripts/fix-local-prisma.js && npx prisma@5.22.0 generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @vetclinic/api build && pnpm --filter vetclinic/web build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm exec prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter @vetclinic/api build && pnpm --filter vetclinic/web build
scripts.build:render: pnpm install && npx prisma@5.22.0 generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm build
